result.text:
item,amount,status
design,1100,approved
audio,750,approved
delivery,300,approved

# Client brief

The Apollo team approved a Northstar handoff organized around clear deliverables, working material, research, and meeting notes.

## Client brief

- Start with the [project notes](../notes/Apollo-project-notes.md#handoff-plan).
- Use the [audience research](../research/Apollo-audience-research.txt).
- Follow the [brand guide](../references/Apollo-brand-guide.pdf).
- Keep the [project terms](../references/Apollo-terms.txt).
- Finish with the [delivery checklist](../handoff/Apollo-delivery-notes.md#delivery-checklist).

# Delivery notes

## Delivery checklist

The final review also includes the [contact sheet](../references/Apollo-contact-sheet.jpg).

# Project notes

## Handoff plan

The notes separate evidence, work in progress, and approved outputs without dropping any file.

- Review the [kickoff notes](meetings/Apollo-kickoff-notes.md#kickoff).
- Review the [approval notes](meetings/Apollo-approval-notes.md#approval).
- Keep the [cover draft](../working/design/Apollo-cover-draft.png) with working material.
- Keep the [layout draft](../working/design/Apollo-layout-draft.jpg) with working material.
- Keep the [narration draft](../working/audio/Apollo-narration-draft.wav) with working material.
- Keep the [interview excerpt](../working/audio/Apollo-interview-excerpt.mp3) with working material.

# Approval notes

## Approval

The client approved the five final deliverables listed below.

- [Final report](../../approved/Apollo-final-report.pdf)
- [Presentation](../../approved/Apollo-presentation.pdf)
- [Cover image](../../approved/Apollo-cover.png)
- [Approved budget](../../approved/Apollo-budget.csv)
- [Approved narration](../../approved/Apollo-narration.wav)

# Kickoff notes

## Kickoff

The kickoff established the evidence base and the working schedule.

- Recheck the [client brief](../../briefing/Apollo-client-brief.md#client-brief).
- Read the [interview summary](../../research/Apollo-interview-summary.txt).
- Retain the [source log](../../research/Apollo-source-log.csv).
- Retain the [working budget](../../working/data/Apollo-budget-working.csv).
- Retain the [working timeline](../../working/data/Apollo-timeline-working.xlsx).
- Retain the [layout cache](../../working/cache/Apollo-layout-cache.bin).

Synthetic demonstration terms
Every file is retained. The original folder remains unchanged. No personal data is included.

Northstar audience research
Primary readers need a concise handoff, visible approval status, and traceable supporting material.

Interview summary
Participants asked for clear final deliverables while retaining drafts and research for context.

source,owner,status
briefing,client,approved
interviews,research,complete
meeting-notes,project-team,complete

item,amount,status
design,1200,draft
audio,800,draft
delivery,300,draft
